history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, portrait-style photograph features a young East Asian woman with her hair styled in two messy buns on top of her head, with bangs framing her face. She is wearing round, silver-rimmed glasses. Her makeup is soft and natural, with a focus on rosy cheeks and lips, and subtle eye makeup. She has a light dusting of freckles across her nose and cheeks. She is wearing a dark green bomber jacket with white trim around the collar and cuffs, and large white letters are visible on the front of the jacket, with part of the letters "PAC" clearly discernible. The background is softly blurred and appears to be an indoor setting with warm, ambient lighting coming from the right, casting a gentle glow on her face and hair. The overall mood is intimate, soft, and slightly dreamy, with a warm color palette dominated by earthy greens, browns, and soft peachy tones from her makeup and the lighting. The image has a shallow depth of field, emphasizing the subject.
